package rulecoverage

func NegativeResponseDtoContainsGormTags() string {
    ruleID := "response_dto_contains_gorm_tags"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Response payload structs that carry persistence-only `gorm` tags."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
